Settings ⚙️

App configuration & backup

📱 Where is your data saved?
Storage TypeIndexedDB — built into your phone browser
Database NameGaibAgroDB (version 5)
LocationChrome app data → Site Storage → this file. Not on any server.
Internet Needed?❌ No — 100% offline, data never leaves phone
Auto Delete Risk⚠️ Clearing browser/app data will erase DB. Always keep a backup!
Tables (Stores)products · customers · quotations · applications · settings
Data Summary
0
👨‍🌾 Customers
0
🚜 Products
0
📋 Quotations
0
🌾 Applications
Backup Data
💾 Export Backup
Downloads all your data as a .json file to your phone. Save it to Google Drive, WhatsApp yourself, or keep it in Downloads. This file contains everything — customers, products, quotations, applications.
Last backup: Never
Restore Data
📂 Import Backup
Select a previously downloaded backup .json file to restore your data. Use this if you cleared browser data, switched phones, or reinstalled the app.
⚠️ Warning: Restoring will merge backup data with existing data. Existing records with the same ID will be overwritten. Take a fresh backup before restoring if needed.
Product Master
🚜 Load Master Products
Excel से सभी 13 products automatically add करें। जो products पहले से exist करती हैं (same name + model) वो skip होंगी — कोई data delete नहीं होगा।
Product Master
🚜 Load Master Products
Excel से सभी 13 products automatically add करें। नहीं होगा।
Cloud Sync
☁️ Firebase Sync
Phone ka saara data cloud mein save karo. Nayi device pe bhi data milega.
☁️ Checking...
Last sync: Never
Gemini OCR Settings
🤖 Gemini API Key
Aadhaar OCR ke liye Gemini API key daalo. Yeh sirf aapke phone mein save hogi — GitHub pe nahi jayegi.

📞 Share on WhatsApp

WhatsApp में हिंदी में कोटेशन मैसेज भेजा जाएगा। PDF खुद WhatsApp में manually attach करें। नंबर save नहीं होगा।

🌐 Track on Rajkisan Portal
rajkisan.rajasthan.gov.in
Application / Ref No.
—
Fill these fields on the portal:
Field 1 (Type) Subsidy
Field 2 (Dept) AGRICULTURE
Field 3 (Category) Farm-implements
Field 4 (App No.) —
Portal Status → App Status mapping:
Application Submitted ✅ → Applied
Document Scrutiny Done ✅ → Verified
Pre-Verification In Process → Verified
Administrative Sanction → Approved
Financial Sanction → Subsidy Released
Completion Confirmation → Delivered
Check status on portal then select below

Delete?

This will be permanently removed.
